sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2875" key="a)kallie/rhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκαλλ-ιέρητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2875.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not accepted</tr_> by gods, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ill-omened</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἱερά</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:131" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.131</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">152</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
